post.subject: I want a cigarette!
post.body:
Ive just come out of my final test for my programming module. It was fuckin tough. I got 48%. Shit, I know, Im just hoping its enough...

Right now i really really want a cigarette. I was one of the last left to do the test. I hit the 'submit' button with 01 seconds to go.

December 7, 2004 5:11pm Quiz submitted  59:59 00:01

I rushed some of the last questions, randomly selecting an answer for one or two. Looking over the test now and seeing the right answers against what I chose I think I got more right in the second half than the first.

Anyway, enough of that. Its over. Im not gonna worry about it. Im just gonna buy a packet of cigarettes and some alcohol!

 

Ever been called mean and thoughtless by someone you care for and think about a lot... It really doesnt feel good

comments.body:
Who in the heck called you that.  You are anything but mean and thoughtless.  You are a gem of a man.
Don't doubt yourself.
comments.author: chrissyk_lotn

comments.body: If someone called me mean and thoughtless, I would laugh at them. Just for comic effect, y'know.
comments.author: floorswine
